hero.title: About <highlight>me</highlight>
hero.subtitle: Who I am, my journey, skills, and creative vision
hero.name: Andrea Losavio
hero.bio1: I am a <bold>Computer Engineer</bold> who graduated from <bold>Politecnico di Milano</bold> in 2019, registered with the professional board under number <link>34249</link>, section B. I have been passionate about programming since 2009, fascinated from an early age by the logic and structure behind software — exploring the fundamentals of programming, computer architecture, and algorithms.
hero.bio2: I began my professional journey in the IT consulting sector in 2018 and started working as a <bold>freelancer</bold> in early 2023. Today, I collaborate with companies and startups as a <bold>Software Engineer & Tech Partner</bold>, helping them develop high-quality digital products and grow through tailored technological solutions.
hero.bio3: In 2023, I designed and developed the <link>Fast Memo</link> app and website, currently available on both Android and iOS stores.

beyondCode.title: <highlight>Beyond</highlight> code
